calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.
Plaintiff, Nasir Patel, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Defendant, Raymond Lavin, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Patel.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, defendant Raymond Lavin shall have until 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, April 1, 2008 to vacate the premises located at the Park Hotel, 1040 Folsom Street, #8, San Francisco, CA 94103. In exchange, plaintiff Nasir Patel shall waive all past due rent owed by defendant Raymond Lavin to plaintiff Nasir Patel, to the date of today's hearing, totaling $3,750.00. Furthermore, both parties agree to a general release of liability pursuant to Civil Code 1542. Lastly, if defendant Raymond Lavin fails to vacate the afore-mentioned premises by the agreed upon date, plaintiff Nasir Patel shall, on ex parte application, obtain a judgment in the amount of $4,350.00 against defendant Raymond Lavin.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., FEB-28-2008: PLAINTIFF MR. NASIR PATEL APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF AS THE PLAINTIFF IN THE CAUSE; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT RAYMOND LAVIN THIS DAY.

THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF THE D-218 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR; THE TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
